question: Was the act committed with the intention to outrage the woman's modesty?

yes.question: Was the act committed with the intention to disrobe or compel the woman to be naked?

yes.name: Assault or use of criminal force to woman with intent to disrobe

no.name: Assault or use of criminal force to woman with intent to outrage her modesty

no.question: Was the act committed with the intention to insult the woman's modesty?

yes.name: Word, gesture or act intended to insult modesty of a woman

no.question: Was the act committed with the intention to sexually harass the woman?
Was the act committed with the intention to watch, capture or disseminate an image of the woman?
Did the act involve following, contacting or monitoring the woman's online activities?

group: Of criminal force and assault against woman

_meta.chapter_subtype: Of criminal force and assault against woman
